# Free Plate Check

> Free UK vehicle lookup tool. Check any UK vehicle's MOT history, tax status, mileage records, ULEZ compliance, safety recalls, and estimated valuation — completely free, no signup required. Uses official DVLA and DVSA data sources.

## Core Tools

- [Free Car Check](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/car-check): Run a free car check on any UK vehicle. See make, model, colour, engine size, fuel type, tax status and MOT history by entering a registration number.
- [Free MOT History Check](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/mot-check): Check any vehicle's full MOT history free. See pass/fail results, advisories, mileage records and next MOT due date.
- [Car Tax Check](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/tax-check): Check if any UK vehicle is taxed. See current tax status, expiry date and whether a SORN is in place. Free, instant, no signup required.
- [Mileage Check](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/mileage-check): Check a vehicle's recorded mileage history free. See odometer readings from every MOT test to spot clocking and verify genuine mileage.
- [ULEZ Compliance Check](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/ulez-check): Check if any UK vehicle is ULEZ compliant. See emission standards, Euro status and whether the vehicle meets London's Ultra Low Emission Zone requirements.
- [Safety Recall Check](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/recall-check): Check if any UK vehicle has outstanding safety recalls from the DVSA. Free lookup by registration number.
- [Free Car Valuation](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/car-valuation): Get a free estimated valuation for any UK vehicle based on age, mileage and market data. No signup required.
- [Running Costs Calculator](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/running-costs): Find out how much it costs to run any UK car. Free breakdown of fuel, tax, depreciation, MOT and servicing costs.
- [Car Servicing Quotes](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/servicing): Compare car service prices from local garages. Interim and full service quotes in seconds, no booking fees.
- [MOT Reminder](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/mot-reminder): Set up a free MOT reminder for any UK vehicle. Get notified 28 days and 7 days before your MOT expires.
- [Vehicle Comparison](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/compare): Compare two UK vehicles side by side — MOT history, tax status, mileage, specifications and valuations.
- [Clean Air Zones](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/clean-air-zones): Complete guide to UK Clean Air Zones. See which cities charge, daily rates, affected vehicles and compliance by registration.
- [Car Guides](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/cars): Free buyer's guides for the UK's most popular cars. MOT pass rates, NCAP safety ratings, running costs and reliability data.
- [Embed Widget](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/embed): Add a free UK vehicle check widget to your website. Easy embed code for forums, dealers and bloggers.

## UK Motoring Statistics

- [Stats Hub](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats): Interactive charts and data covering every aspect of UK motoring — fuel prices, MOT pass rates, car theft, EV adoption and more.
- [Fuel Prices](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/fuel-prices): UK petrol and diesel price history from 1988 to present with interactive charts and fill-cost calculator.
- [Cost of Motoring](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/cost-of-motoring): Full annual breakdown of UK driving costs — fuel, insurance, depreciation, tax and servicing since 2010.
- [Road Tax (VED) History](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/road-tax-history): How VED rates have changed since 2001, from CO2 bands to the 2025 EV charges.
- [Used Car Prices](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/used-car-prices): Quarterly used car price index showing market trends, the COVID spike and correction.
- [Fuel Type Comparison](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/fuel-type-comparison): Compare running costs for petrol, diesel, hybrid and electric vehicles at any annual mileage.
- [MOT Pass Rates](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/mot-pass-rates): National first-time MOT pass rates by make and the most common failure categories.
- [Most Reliable Cars](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/most-reliable-cars): Car reliability rankings based on millions of real MOT test results.
- [UK Mileage Trends](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/uk-mileage): Average annual mileage trends over the decades and how mileage varies by vehicle age.
- [Most Popular Cars](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/popular-cars): Top makes and models on UK roads by fleet size and how best-sellers have changed.
- [EV Adoption](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/ev-adoption): Electric vehicle fleet growth, new sales share and regional EV density across the UK.
- [Car Registrations](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/car-registrations): Annual new car sales since 1990 with fuel type split showing the shift to electric.
- [Car Theft Statistics](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/car-theft): Most stolen cars ranked by theft rate and national vehicle theft trends.
- [Road Safety](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/stats/road-safety): UK road fatalities since 1970, casualties by road user type and key safety milestones.

## Guides & Articles

- [Most Common MOT Failures and How to Avoid Them](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/most-common-mot-failures): The top 10 reasons cars fail the MOT in the UK, what testers are looking for in each category, and a practical pre-MOT checklist so you can spot problems before the test does.
- [Can You Get Your MOT Done Early?](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/can-you-get-mot-done-early): Everything you need to know about getting your MOT done before the expiry date — the one-month rule, what happens if you go too early, first MOT timing, and how to use early testing to your advantage.
- [How Much Does an MOT Cost in 2026?](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-much-does-mot-cost): What you'll actually pay for an MOT in 2026 — the maximum fee, typical garage prices, what affects cost, free retests, and practical ways to save money on your annual test.
- [Electric Car Road Tax 2026: How Much Will EV Owners Pay?](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/electric-car-road-tax-2026): A complete guide to electric vehicle road tax in 2026 — what EVs pay, the £50,000 supplement threshold, and how rates compare to petrol and diesel.
- [How to Appeal an MOT Failure — Your Rights Explained](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-appeal-mot-failure): What to do if you think your car has been unfairly failed on its MOT. How the appeal process works, time limits, and when it's worth challenging the result.
- [What to Check on a Test Drive: A Complete Checklist](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/what-to-check-on-a-test-drive): Everything to check when test driving a used car — engine, brakes, steering, gearbox, electrics, and the warning signs that should make you walk away.
- [How to Tax a Car Online — Step-by-Step Guide](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-tax-a-car-online): How to tax your car online with the DVLA, what you need, how much it costs, and what happens if you forget. A complete guide to UK vehicle tax.
- [Euro Emission Standards Explained: Euro 1 to Euro 6 (and What It Means for Your Car)](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/euro-emission-standards-explained): A clear guide to Euro emission standards in the UK — what they are, which standard your car meets, and how it affects ULEZ, tax, and resale value.
- [Car Tax Changes April 2026: What Every UK Driver Needs to Know](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/car-tax-changes-april-2026): All the VED changes coming on 1 April 2026 — higher standard rates, increased first-year tax, EV threshold relief, and what it means for your car.
- [Car Insurance Groups Explained: Groups 1–50 and What They Mean](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/car-insurance-groups-explained): How car insurance groups work in the UK, what determines which group a car falls into, and how to find cheaper insurance by choosing the right vehicle.
- [What Is an HPI Check? Free vs Paid Car Checks Explained](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/what-is-hpi-check): What an HPI check covers, how it compares to free car checks, and when you should pay for a full vehicle history report.
- [How to Check a Car's Service History Before You Buy](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-check-car-service-history): How to verify a used car's service history, what a full service history means, and why gaps in the record should raise red flags.
- [How to Check a Car's CO2 Emissions](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-check-car-co2-emissions): How to find out a car's CO2 emissions, why they matter for road tax, ULEZ, and running costs, and what the figures actually mean.
- [What to Do if Your Car Fails Its MOT](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/what-to-do-if-car-fails-mot): Your car has failed its MOT — now what? A practical guide to your options, your rights, and how to get back on the road as quickly and cheaply as possible.
- [How to Spot a Clocked Car — 8 Warning Signs to Watch For](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-spot-a-clocked-car): Mileage fraud affects 1 in 16 used cars in the UK. Learn how to spot a clocked car using MOT history, wear patterns, and free mileage checks before you buy.
- [How to SORN a Car Online — Step-by-Step Guide](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-sorn-a-car): How to declare a SORN on your vehicle, when you need one, and what the rules are. A quick guide to the Statutory Off Road Notification process.
- [What Is a SORN and When Do You Need One?](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/what-is-sorn-and-when-do-you-need-one): Everything you need to know about SORN declarations in the UK — when to make one, what the rules are, and what happens if you don't.
- [What Is a V5C Logbook? Everything You Need to Know](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/what-is-a-v5c-logbook): What the V5C logbook is, what it shows, why it matters when buying or selling a car, and how to get a replacement if yours is lost or stolen.
- [How to Read a Car's MOT History (And What to Look For)](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-read-mot-history): Your guide to understanding MOT test results — what pass, fail, advisory, major and dangerous mean, and how to spot red flags in a vehicle's history.
- [How to Check if a Car Is Stolen Before You Buy](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-check-if-car-is-stolen): How to check whether a used car has been reported stolen, what the warning signs are, and how to protect yourself when buying privately.
- [10 Essential Checks Before Buying a Used Car](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/used-car-checks-before-buying): A practical checklist of things to verify before handing over money for a used car — from MOT history to mileage red flags.
- [How Much Is My Car Worth? A Guide to Car Valuations](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/car-valuation-guide): Understand how car valuations work, what affects your vehicle's value, and how to get the best price when selling. Free, practical advice for UK car owners.
- [Cheapest Cars to Tax in the UK (2026 Guide)](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/cheapest-cars-to-tax-uk): A guide to the cheapest cars to tax in the UK — which vehicles pay zero or low road tax, how VED bands work, and how to check what you'll pay.
- [First Car Checklist for New Drivers](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/first-car-checklist-new-drivers): Everything a new driver needs to know before buying their first car — insurance, tax, MOT, running costs, and the checks that could save you money.
- [How to Check if a Car Has Outstanding Finance](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-check-if-car-has-finance): How to find out if a used car has outstanding finance before you buy, what happens if you buy a financed car, and how to protect yourself.
- [How to Check Mileage on a Used Car](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-check-mileage-used-car): How to verify a used car's mileage history using MOT records — spot clocking, detect discrepancies, and protect yourself from mileage fraud.
- [How to Transfer a Private Number Plate in the UK](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-transfer-private-plate): Step-by-step guide to transferring a private number plate between vehicles, putting a plate on retention, and what it costs. DVLA rules explained.
- [What Does Cat N and Cat S Mean? Insurance Write-Off Categories Explained](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/what-does-cat-n-s-mean): A clear guide to insurance write-off categories in the UK — Cat A, B, S and N. What they mean, whether you can buy a written-off car, and what to check.
- [What Happens if You Drive Without an MOT?](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/what-happens-driving-without-mot): The penalties for driving without a valid MOT in the UK — fines, insurance issues, and the exceptions you need to know about.
- [When Is My MOT Due? How to Check and Never Miss It](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/when-is-my-mot-due): How to check when your MOT is due, what happens if you miss it, and how to make sure you never forget — a quick guide for UK drivers.
- [How to Check if a Car Is Taxed](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/how-to-check-if-a-car-is-taxed): A quick guide to checking a vehicle's tax status in the UK — what to look for, what the statuses mean, and why it matters.
- [What Does an MOT Advisory Mean?](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/what-does-mot-advisory-mean): A plain-English guide to MOT advisories — what they are, when to worry, and what to do next.
- [Car Safety Recalls: Everything You Need to Know](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/car-safety-recalls-guide): A practical guide to vehicle safety recalls in the UK — how they work, how to check if your car is affected, and what to do about it.
- [Is My Car ULEZ Compliant? A Complete Guide](https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk/blog/is-my-car-ulez-compliant): Find out whether your car meets ULEZ emission standards, what happens if it doesn't, and what your options are — covering London's ULEZ and other UK Clean Air Zones.

## About

Free Plate Check is an independent UK vehicle information service. All vehicle data is sourced from official DVLA and DVSA government databases. The service is completely free to use with no account registration required. The site does not store registration numbers and is designed with user privacy in mind.

Website: https://www.freeplatecheck.co.uk
